title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Poor ballot design affects all voters and can result in the disenfranchisement of hundreds of thousands of votes.
The easier we make ballots to read and understand, the more likely voters will be to participate in elections.
AB 1219 will codify the recommendations of the Ballot Design Advisory Committee.
AB 1037 will give California’s voters more flexibility and provide greater efficiency in fixing or curing their Vote by Mail ballot.
AB 1037 expands the ability for election administrators to assist voters in curing inadvertent issues that impact the processing of their ballots.
Data from multiple statewide elections shows a pattern across the state that voters are not curing their ballots upon receiving notification at a significant rate.
Voting twice in the same election in two different states is a violation of the principle of one-person, one-vote.
